name: Dash Realm
short_description: Dash Realm is a 2D multiplayer top down action shooter, ideal for those boring breaks between two games. Compete against your friends in the arena and claim victory!
detailed_description:
Using everything you can find, your goal is to push your opponents off the map. Guns? Potatoes? (guys we should add potatoes) It's a deathmatch, no time to be picky. Especially because each hit you take the more knockback you receive from future hits, this means the game quickly escalates. Will you dash out of the way?

Dash Realm is focused on multiplayer experiences with your friends and people online. No matter where you are, you are able to play locally, or online.


• 2 to 4 Players in either Local or Online Multiplayer (No Single Player Mode)
• Physics-based combat Weapons
• 4 characters
• 8 weapons
• 2 maps
• Custom round options
